XMLDB.COMMENT: Nucleus federation hub — tables for registered spokes, projected users (Mode B), outbound event log, and course-versioning draft/changelog state (ADR-014).

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleushub_spokes
TABLE.COMMENT: Spokes registered with this federation hub. Phase 0 holds a single row, inserted manually; Phase 1 is populated by the control plane at spoke provisioning time.

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Human-readable spoke name.

FIELD.NAME: wwwroot
FIELD.COMMENT: Spoke's wwwroot reachable from the hub.

FIELD.NAME: token
FIELD.COMMENT: Shared secret used by this spoke to call hub web services. Phase 0 is the matching wstoken.

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: active | suspended

FIELD.NAME: cpspokeid
FIELD.COMMENT: Control-plane Spoke.id (cuid). Set at register_spoke time; used to address the spoke on outbound events without a name lookup. Phase B1.

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleushub_projusers
TABLE.COMMENT: Projected users (Mode B only). Maps a (spokeid, spokeuserid) tuple to a shadow mdl_user record on the hub. Created on first enrolment of the spoke user in any hub-hosted course.

FIELD.NAME: spokeuserid
FIELD.COMMENT: User id on the spoke side.

FIELD.NAME: hubuserid
FIELD.COMMENT: Shadow mdl_user.id on the hub.

FIELD.NAME: spokeusername
FIELD.COMMENT: Denormalised for debugging — authoritative value lives on the spoke.

FIELD.NAME: spokeemail
FIELD.COMMENT: Denormalised for debugging — authoritative value lives on the spoke.

INDEX.NAME: spoke_user
INDEX.COMMENT: The lookup key used at enrolment time. FK on hubuserid already provides a reverse-lookup index.

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleushub_events
TABLE.COMMENT: Outbound event log. Every envelope published to the Redis stream is mirrored here for debugging and (eventually) replay. Not load-bearing for correctness in Phase 0.

FIELD.NAME: envelopeid
FIELD.COMMENT: Envelope.id set by the publisher.

FIELD.NAME: streamid
FIELD.COMMENT: Redis stream id returned by XADD.

FIELD.NAME: type
FIELD.COMMENT: Envelope type, e.g. completion.v1

FIELD.NAME: destination
FIELD.COMMENT: hub | spoke:<id> | broadcast

FIELD.NAME: payload
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON-encoded envelope.payload.

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleushub_draft
TABLE.COMMENT: Hub-side tracking for the live draft of each course family: which Moodle course is the working copy, what the latest published version was, and how many unpublished edits have accumulated since then. Exactly one row per family (one-course model per ADR-014).

FIELD.NAME: familyid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to local_nucleuscommon_family.id. Unique — the one-course model pins a draft to one family.

FIELD.NAME: hubcourseid
FIELD.COMMENT: mdl_course.id of the working hub course. Unique — one course can back one family.

FIELD.NAME: lastpublishversionid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to local_nucleuscommon_version.id. Null if the family has never been published.

FIELD.NAME: pendingchangecount
FIELD.COMMENT: Changelog rows accumulated since the last publish. Resets to 0 on publish.

FIELD.NAME: timelastedit
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix time of the most recent edit event, for 'N minutes ago' banners.

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleushub_changelog
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-family accumulator of course-edit events since the last publish. Rolled up into the version's releasenotes summary on publish, then cleared. Populated by hooks into Moodle course/module/section/file events (see ADR-014 §Hub-side editing lifecycle).

FIELD.NAME: eventkind
FIELD.COMMENT: Normalised event name, e.g. 'module_added', 'module_updated', 'section_updated', 'file_replaced', 'course_updated'.

FIELD.NAME: objecttype
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional: 'cm', 'section', 'file', 'course' — the kind of thing the event targeted.

FIELD.NAME: objectid
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional: Moodle id of the targeted object (cm id, section id, etc.).

INDEX.NAME: family_time
INDEX.COMMENT: Listing a family's pending changes in chronological order.
